reference: Hi, I had a bad fall about one and a half years ago. I hurt my knee and part of my lower leg. I am retaining water in my leg now. The doctor said he does not know why. The part that is constantly in pain after walking is just behind my kneecap. It feels like the muscle going down to my leg at the back. I slipped and fell on my knee, bending it backwards.
text: Hi, I heard a dad fall about one and a half days ago. I hurt my knee and part of my lower leg. I am no turning water in my leg now. The doctor said he did not know why. The proof that he's constantly in pain as I walk in is just to be in my Utah. It feels like the metal green going from my legs at the back. I slipped and fell on my knee, ending it backwards.
